actual_output.summary: An employee submits an invoice which the manager reviews. If the invoice amount exceeds 5000 EUR, finance must approve it. After approval, payment is triggered.

steps.action: Submit invoice
Review invoice
Approve invoice
Trigger payment

actual_output.missing_information: Who triggers the payment; what happens if manager or finance rejects the invoice; payment method and timing; approval timeframes; handling when amount is exactly 5000 EUR (inclusive/exclusive); any escalation or exception handling.

actual_output.summary: An employee creates and submits a purchase request to the manager. The manager checks the request and returns it to the employee if incomplete. If the amount exceeds 10,000 EUR, procurement reviews it. After final approval, a purchase order is created.

steps.action: Create a purchase request and submit it to the manager
Check the purchase request
If the request is incomplete, send it back to the employee
If the amount is above 10000 EUR, forward the request to procurement for review
After final approval, create a purchase order

decision_points.true_branch: Proceed to amount check / next approval steps
decision_points.false_branch: Manager sends the request back to the employee
Proceed to final approval (no procurement review)

risks: Final approver is not specified (unclear approval authority)
Outcome and handling after procurement review are not defined
No criteria provided for what makes a request 'incomplete'
actual_output.missing_information: Identity of the final approver; criteria for completeness; steps/outcomes after procurement review (e.g., approval, rejection, escalation); what happens if procurement rejects or requests changes; timeline/SLAs for reviews

actual_output.summary: A department submits a budget request. Finance reviews available budget and approves the request if sufficient funds exist; otherwise the request is rejected. Risks include delayed approval and missing financial data.

steps.action: Submit budget request
Review available budget
Approve the budget request
Reject the budget request
steps.condition: If sufficient funds are not available

actual_output.missing_information: Criteria for what constitutes 'sufficient funds', notification/communication steps after approval or rejection, timelines or SLAs for review and approval, and any appeal or resubmission process are not specified.

actual_output.summary: An employee submits a vacation request through the HR system; the direct manager reviews it and, if the requested dates overlap with a critical project phase the manager may reject it, otherwise the manager approves and the employee is notified.

steps.action: Submits a vacation request through the HR system.
Reviews the vacation request.
Determines whether the requested dates overlap with a critical project phase.
steps.condition: If requested dates overlap with a critical project phase

steps.action: May reject the request.
Approves the request.
steps.condition: False branch of step 3 (dates do not overlap)

steps.action: Employee is notified of the decision.

decision_points.condition: Requested dates overlap with a critical project phase
decision_points.false_branch: Manager approves the request and the employee is notified.

inputs: Vacation request (includes requested dates) submitted via HR system
outputs: Employee notification of approval or rejection
actual_output.missing_information: Who (manager or HR system) performs the notification; how "critical project phase" is identified/defined; whether additional approvals or escalations are required; response time/SLA for manager review; whether rejection is mandatory when overlap occurs or discretionary beyond 'may reject'.

actual_output.summary: Buyer requests onboarding of a new supplier. Procurement collects tax and banking documents. Compliance verifies regulatory requirements. If required documents are missing the request is returned to procurement; if checks pass the supplier is activated in the system.

steps.action: Submit request to onboard a new supplier
Collect the supplier's tax documents and banking information
Check whether the supplier meets regulatory requirements
If any required document is missing, send the request back to procurement
Activate the supplier in the system once all checks are completed successfully

decision_points.false_branch: Supplier activated in the system after successful checks

inputs: Request to onboard a new supplier (from Buyer)
outputs: Request returned to procurement for missing documents
actual_output.missing_information: Actual process name; which actor/system performs the action of sending the request back and which actor/system performs the supplier activation; exact list of required documents beyond tax and banking; SLAs or timeframes for procurement collection and compliance checks; details of resubmission flow after a request is returned
